positive: A central, symmetrical, and intricate stylized composition featuring bioluminescent flora roots intertwining with celestial constellations and cosmic nebulae. The style is neo-art nouveau merged with vaporwave psychedelic geometry. Strong, high-contrast silhouette against a deep midnight blue and violet gradient background. Use glowing elements (luminous lines, glowing roots) for pop, accented by metallic gold filigree and geometric patterns that radiate outwards. The design must be highly readable and scalable for apparel printing, maintaining clean lines and a central focal point. Illuminated by soft, magical internal glow, cinematic lighting, 8k detail, seamless pattern potential, high saturation.
negative: blurry, deformed, messy lines, low contrast, noise, grainy, watermark, text, logo, signature, cartoon, sketch, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, artifacts, photorealism, cluttered, messy
